data.body: DeepAgentsRunner landed as an OPT-IN runner (REBAR_LLM_RUNNER=deepagents): runs the operation on LangChain deepagents (planning/subagents/eviction) with a read-only repo-rooted FilesystemBackend + our findings schema. The review DEFAULT stays the langgraph runner with our citation-disciplined tools; deepagents is the seam for future task types. (commit pending)
